description: This textured leather loafer from provogue for men with a refined, stacked heel is designed for the debonair who pushes the sartorial envelope as much as he can. The busy dotted texturing on the upper is balanced with a suede overlay on the toe box. Style this with flat front trousers, a tonal blazer and a crisp shirt. UpperFaux croc leather textured upper with reinforced overlay on the heel Suede overlay on the toe boxSlip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearabilitySoft sockliner for instep comfortBrand badge on the lateral side of the midfootMidsoleShock absorbing EVA midsoleOutsoleTPR outsole with a stacked heel Textured grooves on the forefoot for grip and tractionWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
